title: Pitch Me — Ranjan Dasgupta | Send Your Idea
description: Pitch me: send your idea to Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
Got an idea? A brief? A problem? Ranjan Dasgupta has spent nine-plus years in AdTech—product, strategy, exchange. If you want to pitch: contact. Bring the problem, the context, and what you've tried. I might not say yes to everything, but I'll listen. See solve this and build an ad with me.

Work, About, Insights.

title: Solve This — Ranjan Dasgupta | A Challenge
description: Solve this: a challenge from Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
Here's a challenge: take a publisher with low fill and high latency. Improve yield without burning trust. Ranjan Dasgupta has done that at Glance and InMobi. If you want to try, the tools are in programmatic, yield optimization, and supply path optimization. See pitch me if you have a solution—or a harder problem. Contact.

Work, About.

title: Can You Beat My Ad — Ranjan Dasgupta | The Challenge
description: Can you beat my ad? A creative challenge from Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
I've shipped a lot of ad product—not always the creative itself, but the systems that serve it. Ranjan Dasgupta challenges you: can you beat the best ad you've seen? Better brief, better creative, better result. See write me a better copy, rate this ad, and the art of the click. Contact to share.

Work, About.

title: Write Me a Better Copy — Ranjan Dasgupta | Copy Challenge
description: Write me a better copy: a copy challenge from Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
Copy is hard. Ranjan Dasgupta has focused on the pipes, but he knows good copy when he sees it. If you think you can write a better headline, CTA, or body—try. See I dream in copy, can you beat my ad, and creative on demand. Contact to submit.

Work, About.

title: Rate This Ad — Ranjan Dasgupta | Your Verdict
description: Rate this ad: your verdict. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
Pick an ad—any ad. Rate it: clarity, relevance, CTA. Ranjan Dasgupta has built the systems that serve billions of ads; the creative is what you see. If you want to share your rating or debate, contact. See ad or bad, guess my CTR, and the perfect ad.

Work, About.

title: Guess My CTR — Ranjan Dasgupta | A Numbers Game
description: Guess my CTR: a numbers game. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
I won't give you the number. But I'll tell you: it's been optimized over years of yield optimization and programmatic at scale. Ranjan Dasgupta has seen CTRs from terrible to great. The difference is placement, creative, and audience. See click magnet, rate this ad, and I speak data. Contact to guess.

Work, About.

title: Ad or Bad — Ranjan Dasgupta | Good vs Bad Ads
description: Ad or bad: good vs bad ads. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
Some ads are good. Some are bad. The line isn't always clear. Ranjan Dasgupta has built the infrastructure; the creative is a separate art. See rate this ad, spot the fake ad, and beautiful interruptions. Contact.

Work, About.

title: Real or AI — Ranjan Dasgupta | Can You Tell?
description: Real or AI: can you tell? By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
More creative is AI-assisted. Can you tell? Ranjan Dasgupta has written about AI in advertising. The game: real or AI-generated copy, creative, or strategy. See spot the fake ad, ad or bad, and creative on demand. Contact.

Work, About.

title: Spot the Fake Ad — Ranjan Dasgupta | The Game
description: Spot the fake ad: the game. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
Fake as in non-human, or fake as in scam? Both matter. Ranjan Dasgupta has worked on viewability and invalid traffic—knowing what's real is part of the job. See real or AI, ad or bad, and programmatic. Contact.

Work, About.

title: Build an Ad With Me — Ranjan Dasgupta | Let's Build
description: Build an ad with me: let's build. By Ranjan Dasgupta.
content:
From brief to launch. Ranjan Dasgupta has done it at Google, Glance, and InMobi. If you have a product, an audience, and a goal, we can build the strategy and the pipe. See pitch me, contact, and Work. For the full stack, programmatic, my brain is a brief.

About, Insights.
